code: import React from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import'./CategoriesSection.css';import'../api/Home.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const CategoriesSection=()=>{const categories=[{name:'Laptop',image:'/laptop.png',slug:'laptops'},{name:'Gaming',image:'/gaming.png',slug:'gamings'},{name:'Desktop',image:'/desktop.png',slug:'desktops'},{name:'iPad',image:'/ipad.png',slug:'ipads-tablets'},{name:'CCTV',image:'/cctv.png',slug:'cctvs'},{name:'Other',image:'/other.png',slug:'others'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{className:"categories-section-premium",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"section-header",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"section-title",children:"Categories"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"categories-grid-premium",children:categories.map(category=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/category/".concat(category.slug),className:"category-card-premium",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{className:"category-img-fill",src:category.image,alt:category.name,loading:"lazy"})},category.slug))})]});};export default CategoriesSection;
